title: Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools

defines.name: Toolformer
defines.definition: A language model trained in a self-supervised way to decide which external APIs to call, when to call them, what arguments to pass, and how to integrate the results into next-token prediction.

problem: Language models struggle with basic capabilities like arithmetic, factual lookup, up-to-date information, low-resource languages, and time awareness, and existing tool-use methods require heavy supervision or task-specific setups.
